description: Master checklist of fundamental and technical factors for prediction generation. Grows over time via post-mortem analysis of wrong predictions — not correlation-mining. Every factor added must have a causal explanation.

macro_factors.name: Brent Crude ($/bbl)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Direct input cost driver for refiners and airlines. India imports 90% of crude — affects fiscal deficit, FII sentiment, rupee.

macro_factors.name: USD/INR Exchange Rate
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Weaker rupee = higher import costs (crude, electronics). Benefits IT and pharma exporters who earn in USD.

macro_factors.name: RBI Repo Rate
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Directly sets cost of borrowing. Higher rates compress margins for debt-heavy PSU infra companies and NBFCs.

macro_factors.name: FII Net Flows (CY)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Sustained FII selling = index headwind regardless of fundamentals. Triggers stop-loss cascades in mid/small caps.

macro_factors.name: DII Net Flows (CY)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: DII buying (SIP inflows, insurance) acts as floor support during FII exits. Net DII-FII gap determines index direction.

macro_factors.name: India PMI (Manufacturing + Services)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Forward-looking indicator of economic activity. PMI below 50 = contraction. Affects earnings expectations across sectors.

macro_factors.name: India CPI Inflation
macro_factors.why_it_matters: High CPI constrains RBI from cutting rates. Affects consumer purchasing power and FMCG volume growth.

macro_factors.name: Government Capex Budget Utilization (%)
macro_factors.why_it_matters: PSU infra stocks (IRFC, IRCON, NHPC) depend on government spending. Low utilization = order delays = earnings miss.

macro_factors.name: US Fed Funds Rate / Fed Outlook
macro_factors.why_it_matters: Higher US rates = stronger USD = capital outflow from EMs including India. Affects FII flows and rupee directly.

sector_factors.name: Gross Refining Margin (GRM) spread
sector_factors.why_it_matters: GRM = revenue per barrel minus crude cost. When crude spikes and government blocks pass-through, GRM collapses. Primary P&L driver for MRPL.

sector_factors.name: ATF Price (Aviation Turbine Fuel)
sector_factors.why_it_matters: ATF = 35-40% of IndiGo operating cost. Tracks Brent with ~2 week lag. Government has separate excise policy for ATF vs petrol/diesel.

sector_factors.name: India Defence Budget (% of GDP + absolute ₹)
sector_factors.why_it_matters: ASTRA MICRO and shipyards earn from defence orders. Budget allocation + Make-in-India push determines order pipeline.

sector_factors.name: Quick Commerce GMV Growth + Profitability Timeline
sector_factors.why_it_matters: SWIGGY and Zomato valued on path to profitability. GMV growth slowing or competitive intensity rising = multiple compression.

sector_factors.name: Renewable Energy Capex + BESS Orders
sector_factors.why_it_matters: NHPC and ACME SOLAR revenue depends on project commissioning. Government renewable targets drive order flow.

sector_factors.name: Shipbuilding Order Book + Delivery Timeline
sector_factors.why_it_matters: COCHINSHIP revenue is long-duration order book driven. CMA CGM contract and defence vessels are the key near-term deliveries.

sector_factors.name: Coal e-Auction Premium vs Notified Price
sector_factors.why_it_matters: Coal India's realisation per tonne = notified price + e-auction premium. Higher crude = more industrial coal demand = higher premium.

sector_factors.name: Hormuz Strait / Geopolitical Shipping Routes
sector_factors.why_it_matters: Hormuz closure reroutes ships via Cape of Good Hope (+2 weeks transit). Reduces effective fleet capacity = higher freight rates. Affects ADANI PORT volumes.

sector_factors.name: India IT Sector Deal Pipeline + US Tech Spend
sector_factors.why_it_matters: IT revenue tied to US enterprise tech spending. Recession fears or discretionary spend cuts = deal slowdown = earnings downgrade.

technical_factors.name: 52-Week High/Low Proximity (within 5%)
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Stocks near 52wk lows have stop-loss clusters below — a breach triggers forced selling. Near 52wk highs = breakout or resistance.

technical_factors.name: Key Support/Resistance Level Test
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Technically significant price levels concentrate buy/sell orders. A test of support with high volume = decision point.

technical_factors.name: Volume Spike on Breakout/Breakdown (2x avg)
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Price moves on high volume = conviction. Same move on low volume = likely reversal. Volume confirms or questions the thesis.

technical_factors.name: RSI Overbought/Oversold (>75 or <25 on weekly)
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Extreme RSI on weekly timeframe = mean reversion tendency. Most useful for short-term 1D/7D predictions.

technical_factors.name: 50-Day / 200-Day MA Position + Crossover
technical_factors.why_it_matters: Death cross (50 below 200) signals medium-term downtrend. Used for 4W+ predictions. Not useful for 1D/7D.

technical_factors.name: Sector Relative Strength vs Nifty
technical_factors.why_it_matters: A stock can look cheap but if sector is underperforming Nifty, it drags. Relative strength confirms or weakens the individual thesis.

1D.label: 1-Day
1D.purpose: Event-driven — earnings day, RBI policy, results. Fast validation.

7D.label: 7-Day
7D.purpose: Technical thesis — level test, support breach, short-term momentum. Validates in one week.

4W.label: 4-Week
4W.purpose: Catalyst-driven — earnings season, Q4 results impact, FII trend continuation.

2M.label: 2-Month
2M.purpose: Fundamental shift — policy change, earnings cycle, crude trend.

6M.label: 6-Month
6M.purpose: Structural — sector re-rating, macro regime change.

accuracy_thresholds.note: A signal category with <40% accuracy over 8+ predictions triggers post-mortem review. Missing causal factor is identified and added to framework. Not correlation-mining — every new factor must have a fundamental causal explanation.

geopolitical_patterns.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
geopolitical_patterns.rule: For any 3-outcome geopolitical binary (strikes/extension/deal), model explicit reversal trigger. Do not rely on probability weighting alone. 'If best-case materializes → index +2-4%, regime flips.'

geopolitical_patterns.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
geopolitical_patterns.rule: Before making defense stock predictions, model DURATION of tension. 2-6 weeks managed tension = HOLD/ADD defense. Instant peace = REDUCE. Acute short escalation = defense spikes then reverses quickly. STRENGTHENED v5: Even FRAGILE-CEASEFIRE scenarios sustain defense premium for 3-4 weeks if re-escalation risk remains material; do not predict defense pullbacks until BOTH (a) Brent <$92 sustained 5 days AND (b) Hormuz fully open 5 days.

geopolitical_patterns.name: FII Distribution on Geopolitical Relief Rallies
geopolitical_patterns.rule: FII uses geopolitical relief rallies to distribute holdings. DII buys to support market. A ceasefire rally driven purely by DIIs (FII net sellers) is structurally fragile — assign +20-30% additional downside probability within 2-5 sessions. Confirmed: April 8 (-₹2,811 Cr), April 9 (-₹1,711 Cr).

geopolitical_patterns.name: Failed Peace Talks → War Premium Return
geopolitical_patterns.observation: April 11: Islamabad talks ended with NO DEAL after 21 hours. US Navy entered Hormuz. Iran IRGC issued 'last warning.' Pattern: failed high-profile peace talks → Brent spike $3-7, Nifty gap-down -1.5 to -2.5%, gold +1-2%, defense stocks +2-4% at open. April 14 close will confirm or deny.

geopolitical_patterns.name: Trump Future Strike Deadline → Crude Decline
geopolitical_patterns.observation: April 10: Trump's April 22 infrastructure-strike deadline announcement caused Brent to fall from $96.51 to $91-93 intraday. Future deadlines = de-escalation signal. Needs 1 more confirmation.

geopolitical_patterns.name: Large-Cap IT Sell-on-News After Earnings Beat
geopolitical_patterns.observation: TCS Q4FY26: record $12B TCV, revenue BEAT, ₹31 dividend — stock FELL -1.85% on announcement day, continuing -0.6% next day to ₹2,524. Buy-side fully pre-priced the beat. Classic 'sell the news' after 3+ weeks of pre-earnings IT momentum.

geopolitical_patterns.name: Gold Pre-Binary-Event Hedging
geopolitical_patterns.observation: SETFGOLD elevated before Islamabad talks (April 9-10). Post-TALKS_NEUTRAL softened to ₹127.31. Pattern: gold retains/elevates into binary events as hedge. This is a SELL SIGNAL into events, HOLD signal when talks fail. April 11 failed talks likely to confirm gold rally leg.

promoted_patterns_v4.name: IT Regime Risk Filter
promoted_patterns_v4.rule: During any active geopolitical risk regime where Brent >$98 OR Hormuz is actively contested, cap all IT stock prediction confidence at maximum 2★. Macro regime systematically overrides earnings fundamentals for IT exporters. No TCS/INFY/HCLTECH short-horizon reversion calls until Brent sustained <$92 and Hormuz fully open 5+ trading days.

promoted_patterns_v4.name: Diplomatic Restart Trigger
promoted_patterns_v4.rule: After failed peace talks, ALWAYS assign 25-30% probability to diplomatic restart within 48-72 hours. If Trump or any major party signals willingness to negotiate within 72h of talks failure, bearish Nifty/war-premium thesis immediately invalidates. All bearish Nifty predictions after talks failure must include explicit auto-invalidation: 'If diplomatic restart signal within 72h → confidence drops to 1★.'

promoted_patterns_v4.name: Large-Cap IT Sell-on-News After Earnings Beat
promoted_patterns_v4.rule: Large-cap Indian IT stocks systematically underperform expectations for 5-10 trading sessions after earnings beats. Pre-announcement run-up fully prices in consensus beats. Do NOT predict post-earnings breakouts for large-cap IT (TCS, INFY, HCLTECH, WIPRO). Confirmed: TCS Q4FY26 record beat → stock fell for 9+ sessions.

amended_patterns_v4.name: Failed Peace Talks → War Premium Return
amended_patterns_v4.original_rule: Failed high-profile peace talks → Brent spike $3-7, Nifty gap-down -1.5 to -2.5%, gold +1-2%, defense +2-4%.
amended_patterns_v4.amended_rule: War premium DOES return for 24-48 hours after talks failure, but AUTO-EXPIRES if diplomatic restart signal emerges within 72 hours. This is a 1-2 day intraday/swing pattern ONLY. NOT suitable for 7D+ predictions. Any 7D+ prediction built on this pattern must include FORECAST_PAT005 auto-invalidation clause.
amended_patterns_v4.amendment_reason: P024 Nifty WRONG: Nifty went UP instead of DOWN within 7 days of Islamabad talks failure because Trump signaled deal optimism within 48h. P023 SETFGOLD WRONG: Same mechanism. Pattern works for day-traders but fails for medium-horizon predictions.

evolution_log.changes: Added FORECAST_PAT003 (Geopolitical Binary Underweighting) and M012 (Defense Sector Duration Premium). Both promoted after 2 confirmed occurrences from RCA001 and RCA002.

Promoted FII_CEASEFIRE_DISTRIBUTION to framework (2 occurrences: April 8 and 9). Added TALKS_FAILED_WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN as new observing pattern (April 11 Islamabad talks failure). Framework now covers 3 geopolitical regime patterns.
evolution_log.notes: No new predictions scored this week — scoring cluster April 14-17. IRFC surprise: spiked to ₹100.25 vs P010 range ₹85-95 — ceasefire rally override pattern. Gold at ₹127.31 pre-talk failure — will likely rally toward ₹130-134 on failed talks confirmation.

evolution_log.changes: PROMOTED: M013 (IT Regime Risk Filter, 3 confirmations), FORECAST_PAT005 (Diplomatic Restart Trigger, 2 confirmations), SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT (3 confirmations). AMENDED: TALKS_FAILED_WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN — duration constraint added (1-2 day swing pattern only, not 7D+). New predictions P027-P030 all include explicit auto-invalidation clauses.
key_learnings: Diplomatic restart after failed talks is faster than anticipated — FORECAST_PAT005 now active guard
IT sector systematically fails in active geopolitical regimes regardless of earnings quality — M013 cap enforced
Sell-on-news for large-cap IT is structural (5-10 sessions) not tactical — do not predict post-earnings IT breakouts
Gold war premium is highly sensitive to diplomatic signals — use 2★ max until diplomatic situation is stable 3+ days
Best predictions have ONE direct causal link between catalyst and stock outcome
